nasb.text: “If this fixed order departs From before Me,” declares the Lord, “Then the offspring of Israel also will cease From being a nation before Me forever.”

esv.text: “If this fixed order departs from before me, declares the Lord, then shall the offspring of Israel cease from being a nation before me forever.”

cnv.text: “這些定律若能從我面前廢掉， 以色列的後裔也就會在我面前斷絕， 永遠不再成為一個國家。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “只要天地之律还在， 以色列邦国必永续不断。 这是耶和华说的。”
